segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Hi Sara, I am here to show Taskmaster Pro. It helps teams track work.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: We need that right now. We use email and Excel.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Okay, so Taskmaster can fix that.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: See this screen, you create tasks here.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: How does it work exactly?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Basically, you add a task assigned to person, set deadlines, everyone sees it.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Can we attach files to Taskmaster Pro?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Yes, sure. Any file documents images, it's up to 100 MB per file.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Good. What about reminders?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: So, it allows automatic reminders by email, but SMS reminders cost extra.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: How much extra?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: It will be about $50 per month for SMS. Now reporting features.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: We need weekly reports for our manager.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Okay, so Taskmaster makes reports automatically every Monday, PDF goes to the email.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Perfect. Can we try it for free?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Our free trial is 10 users for 7 days. For your 15 people, I can extend to 10 days.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Okay, give us 10 day trial. What happens after trial?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Basic plan is $100 per month for 20 users.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Pro plan is $150 with SMS and advanced reports.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: We need the pro features, but $150 is high.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Okay, so I can give first month at $120, but you need to decide in 2 weeks.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: I will check with my boss, no sport if we have a problem.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: We need phone...

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Email sport is free. Phone sport is $30 extra per month.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: We need phone sport, including in price.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Okay, $150 total with phone sport, I shall send you the details.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Send me everything today, trial, access, price and phone sport details.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Okay, I will send 3 things today. Please test with your team.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Who will test this week? Also, can you train us?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Yes, actually free training video is available, but live training is $200.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Video is in a funnel.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Okay, so good. My tasks are...

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: I have these tasks to do, send trial prices and sport info today.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Your tasks are test with team with this week.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Yes, let's stop next Friday.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Okay, perfect. Bye.
